title: Students aspire to be lawyers like in Suits, not like in Maamla Legal Hai: Supreme Court Justice Sanjay Karol
description: Supreme Court judge Justice Sanjay Karol recently said many law students today aspire to emulate the polished and glamorous legal practice shown in shows like Suits, rather than understanding the realities of everyday courtroom litigation reflected in shows such as Mamla Legal Hai.He began by referring to the character Abhishek Tripathi from the popular series Panchayat, noting how the character enters village administration expecting structure and efficiency, only to encounter delays,
